# Meet Your Faculty

<!--#### NAME

<img src="./img/faculty/MISSINGHEADSHOT.PNG" width="200" alt="Photo of NAME">

>JOB TITLE <br>
INSTITUTION <br>
LOCATION
>
> --- CONTACT INFO, IF PROVIDED

BIO GOES HERE-->



#### Ben Fisher

<img src="./img/faculty/ben-fisher.jpg" width="200" alt="Photo of Ben Fisher">

>Regional Coordinator, CBH Atlantic <br>
Canadian Bioinformatics Hub, Dalhousie University  <br>
Halifax, NS, Canada 
>
> --- atlantic@bioinformatics.ca 


#### Larisa Morales-Soto

<img src="./img/faculty/larisa-adj.png" width="200" alt="Photo of Larisa Morales Soto">

>Platform Manager<br>
Canadian Bioinformatics Hub<br>
Toronto, ON, Canada 
>
> --- pm@bioinformatics.ca

#### Nia Highes

<img src="./img/faculty/nia-hughes.jpeg" width="200" alt="Photo of Nia Hughes">

>Training Manager<br>
Canadian Bioinformatics Hub<br>
Toronto, ON, Canada 
>
> --- training@bioinformatics.ca

#### Kyster Nanan

<img src="./img/faculty/kyster.jpg" width="200" alt="Photo of Kyster Nanan">

>Education Lead & Project Manager, Ontario Molecular Pathology Research Network<br>
Queen's University<br>
Kingston, ON, Canada 
>
> --- kn20@queensu.ca

#### Mohamed Helmy

<img src="./img/faculty/mohamed.jpg" width="200" alt="Photo of Mohamed Helmy">

>Principal Scientist and Adjunct Professor, Vaccine and Infectious Disease Organization<br>
University of Saskatchewan<br>
Kingston, ON, Canada 
>
> --- mohamed.helmy@usask.ca
